title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
